name: Movie Soundtracks
description: Iconic film soundtracks, composers, and Academy Award-winning songs

questions.q: Who sang 'My Heart Will Go On' from the 1997 film Titanic?

source.notes: Composed by James Horner with lyrics by Will Jennings; won Best Original Song.

questions.q: Which Bee Gees-heavy 1977 disco soundtrack became one of the best-selling albums of all time?

source.notes: Includes 'Stayin' Alive', 'How Deep Is Your Love', and 'Night Fever'.

questions.q: Which Whitney Houston power-ballad from The Bodyguard (1992) topped charts globally?

source.notes: Originally written and recorded by Dolly Parton in 1973.

questions.q: 'Eye of the Tiger' by Survivor served as the theme for which Rocky installment?

source.notes: Released 1982; commissioned by Sylvester Stallone after the Rolling Stones declined.

questions.q: Ray Parker Jr.'s iconic 1984 theme song accompanies which supernatural comedy film?

source.notes: Nominated for Best Original Song; Huey Lewis later sued over similarity to 'I Want a New Drug'.

questions.q: 'Don't You (Forget About Me)' by Simple Minds is the defining anthem of which 1985 John Hughes film?

source.notes: Simple Minds initially didn't want to record it — it wasn't their composition.

questions.q: Which Disney film gave us 'Let It Go,' the 2013 Best Original Song Oscar winner?

source.notes: Composed by Kristen Anderson-Lopez and Robert Lopez; performed by Idina Menzel.

questions.q: Phil Collins won an Oscar for 'You'll Be in My Heart,' the love theme from which 1999 Disney animated feature?

source.notes: Collins performed nearly all the songs in the film.

questions.q: Bryan Adams's '(Everything I Do) I Do It for You' was the love theme for which 1991 film?

source.notes: Spent 16 weeks at #1 in the UK.

questions.q: Which composer has scored Star Wars, Indiana Jones, Jurassic Park, and the first three Harry Potter films?

source.notes: Won five Academy Awards across his career.

questions.q: Which composer scored Christopher Nolan's The Dark Knight, Inception, and Interstellar?

source.notes: Won a second Best Original Score Oscar for Dune (2021).

questions.q: Kenny Loggins's 'Danger Zone' and Berlin's 'Take My Breath Away' are signature tracks from which 1986 film?

source.notes: 'Take My Breath Away' won the 1986 Best Original Song Oscar.

questions.q: Seal's 'Kiss From a Rose' was featured on the soundtrack of which 1995 superhero sequel?

source.notes: Won the 1995 Grammy for Record of the Year.

questions.q: Bill Medley and Jennifer Warnes won a Best Original Song Oscar for '(I've Had) The Time of My Life' from which film?

source.notes: 1987; the final dance scene anthem.

questions.q: An Urge Overkill cover of which Neil Diamond song plays during the overdose scene in Pulp Fiction?
choices: Girl, You'll Be a Woman Soon

source.original_a: Girl, You'll Be a Woman Soon
source.notes: Urge Overkill recorded it for an EP in 1992; Tarantino featured it in 1994.

questions.q: Underworld's 'Born Slippy .NUXX' featured prominently in the closing of which 1996 Danny Boyle film?

source.notes: Re-popularized the song and revived Underworld's career.

questions.q: Michael Sembello's 'Maniac' was a chart-topping hit from which 1983 dance film?

source.notes: Originally written about a serial killer before being rewritten for the film.

questions.q: Which composer/lyricist duo won the 1961 Best Original Song Oscar for 'Moon River' from Breakfast at Tiffany's?

source.notes: Performed in the film by Audrey Hepburn.

questions.q: Composer Howard Shore won multiple Oscars for scoring which early-2000s fantasy trilogy?

source.notes: Won Best Original Score for Fellowship (2001) and Return of the King (2003).

questions.q: 'Streets of Philadelphia' earned Bruce Springsteen a Best Original Song Oscar for which 1993 film?

source.notes: Directed by Jonathan Demme; starred Tom Hanks in his Oscar-winning role.

questions.q: Prince composed the soundtrack for which 1989 Tim Burton superhero film?

source.notes: Spawned 'Batdance' and a full Prince album.

questions.q: Curtis Mayfield's seminal 1972 soundtrack album accompanied which groundbreaking blaxploitation film?

source.notes: Nominated for a Grammy; contains 'Pusherman' and 'Freddie's Dead'.
